启动VR遥操：
uv run python ./third_party/XLeVR/vr_controller_panda_simple.py \
  -e TurnGlobeValve-v1 \
  --record-dir /home/firedust/mimic/maniskill_myws/data/hdf5-trajectory

重放轨迹：
uv run python scripts/run_maniskill_demo.py mani_skill.trajectory.replay_trajectory \
  --traj-path /home/firedust/mimic/maniskill_myws/third_party/XLeVR/hdf5-trajectory/TurnGlobeValve-v1/teleop/trajectory.h5 \
  --obs-mode rgb \
  --target-control-mode pd_ee_delta_pose \
  --save-video \
  --use_env_states \
  --shader "rt" \
